title: `Ezra' #5830
definition:
Ezra = "help"

 1) the priest and scribe who led the reforms of the returned exiles
    in Jerusalem; co-worker with Nehemiah
 2) a priest with Zerubbabel
 3) another post-exilic Jew
nasbUsage:

 1) the priest and scribe who led the reforms of the returned exiles
    in Jerusalem; co-worker with Nehemiah
